Private methods: __init__, _compile_cached, _compile_core, _get_implementation, _customize_flags. The `_GeneratedFunctionCompiler` class extends _FunctionCompiler and exposes public methods: get_globals_for_reduction. Private methods: __init__, _get_implementation. The `_CompilingCounter` class extends object. Private methods: __init__, __enter__, __exit__, __bool__. The `_DispatcherBase` class and exposes public methods: signatures, nopython_signatures, disable_compile, add_overload, fold_argument_types, get_call_template, get_overload, is_compiling, inspect_llvm, inspect_asm, inspect_types, inspect_cfg, inspect_disasm_cfg, get_annotation_info, typeof_pyval. Private methods: __init__, _compilation_chain_init_hook, _reset_overloads, _make_finalizer, _compile_for_args, _explain_ambiguous, _explain_matching_error, _search_new_conversions, __repr__. The `_MemoMixin` class. Private methods: _uuid, _set_uuid. The `Dispatcher` class extends _MemoMixin, _DispatcherBase and exposes public methods: dump, enable_caching, compile, get_compile_result, recompile, stats, parallel_diagnostics, get_metadata, get_function_type. Private methods: __init__, _numba_type_, __get__, _reduce_states, _rebuild. The `LiftedCode` class extends _MemoMixin, _DispatcherBase and exposes public methods: get_source_location, compile. Private methods: __init__, _reduce_states, _reduce_extras, _rebuild, _pre_compile. The `LiftedLoop` class extends LiftedCode. Private methods: _pre_compile. The `LiftedWith` class extends LiftedCode and exposes public methods: get_call_template. Private methods: _reduce_extras, _numba_type_. The `ObjModeLiftedWith` class extends LiftedWith and exposes public methods: get_call_template. Private methods: __init__, _numba_type_, _legalize_arg_types.

classDiagram
    class OmittedArg {
        -__init__(value)
        -__repr__()
        -_numba_type_()
    }
    class _FunctionCompiler {
        -__init__(py_func, targetdescr, targetoptions, locals, pipeline_class)
        +fold_argument_types(args, kws)
        +compile(args, return_type)
        -_compile_cached(args, return_type)
        -_compile_core(args, return_type)
        +get_globals_for_reduction()
        -_get_implementation(args, kws)
        -_customize_flags(flags)
    }
    class _GeneratedFunctionCompiler {
        -__init__(py_func, targetdescr, targetoptions, locals, pipeline_class)
        +get_globals_for_reduction()
        -_get_implementation(args, kws)
    }
    class _CompilingCounter {
        -__init__()
        -__enter__()
        -__exit__()
        -__bool__()
    }
    class _DispatcherBase {
        -__init__(arg_count, py_func, pysig, can_fallback, exact_match_required)
        -_compilation_chain_init_hook()
        -_reset_overloads()
        -_make_finalizer()
        +signatures()
        +nopython_signatures()
        +disable_compile(val)
        +add_overload(cres)
        +fold_argument_types(args, kws)
        +get_call_template(args, kws)
        +get_overload(sig)
        +is_compiling()
        -_compile_for_args()
        +inspect_llvm(signature)
        +inspect_asm(signature)
        +inspect_types(file, signature, pretty, style)
        +inspect_cfg(signature, show_wrapper)
        +inspect_disasm_cfg(signature)
        +get_annotation_info(signature)
        -_explain_ambiguous()
        -_explain_matching_error()
        -_search_new_conversions()
        -__repr__()
        +typeof_pyval(val)
    }
    class _MemoMixin {
        -_uuid()
        -_set_uuid(u)
    }
    class Dispatcher {
        -__init__(py_func, locals, targetoptions, impl_kind, pipeline_class)
        +dump(tab)
        -_numba_type_()
        +enable_caching()
        -__get__(obj, objtype)
        -_reduce_states()
        -_rebuild(cls, uuid, py_func, locals, targetoptions, impl_kind, can_compile, sigs)
        +compile(sig)
        +get_compile_result(sig)
        +recompile()
        +stats()
        +parallel_diagnostics(signature, level)
        +get_metadata(signature)
        +get_function_type()
    }
    class LiftedCode {
        -__init__(func_ir, typingctx, targetctx, flags, locals)
        -_reduce_states()
        -_reduce_extras()
        -_rebuild(cls, uuid, func_ir, flags, locals, extras)
        +get_source_location()
        -_pre_compile(args, return_type, flags)
        +compile(sig)
    }
    class LiftedLoop {
        -_pre_compile(args, return_type, flags)
    }
    class LiftedWith {
        -_reduce_extras()
        -_numba_type_()
        +get_call_template(args, kws)
    }
    class ObjModeLiftedWith {
        -__init__()
        -_numba_type_()
        +get_call_template(args, kws)
        -_legalize_arg_types(args)
    }
